Uses of Interface
net.dapete.exceptional.function.ExBiConsumer

Packages that use ExBiConsumer
Package
Description
net.dapete.exceptional.stream
This package provides utilities for handling checked exceptions in Streams.

  • Uses of ExBiConsumer in net.dapete.exceptional.stream

    Methods in net.dapete.exceptional.stream with parameters of type ExBiConsumer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <R> R
    ExDoubleStream.exCollect(ExSupplier<R,?> supplier, ExObjDoubleConsumer<R,?> accumulator, ExBiConsumer<R,R,?> combiner)
    Equivalent of DoubleStream.collect(Supplier, ObjDoubleConsumer, BiConsumer).
    <R> R
    ExIntStream.exCollect(ExSupplier<R,?> supplier, ExObjIntConsumer<R,?> accumulator, ExBiConsumer<R,R,?> combiner)
    Equivalent of IntStream.collect(Supplier, ObjIntConsumer, BiConsumer).
    <R> R
    ExLongStream.exCollect(ExSupplier<R,?> supplier, ExObjLongConsumer<R,?> accumulator, ExBiConsumer<R,R,?> combiner)
    Equivalent of LongStream.collect(Supplier, ObjLongConsumer, BiConsumer).
    <R> R
    ExStream.exCollect(ExSupplier<R,?> supplier, ExBiConsumer<R, ? super T, ?> accumulator, ExBiConsumer<R,R,?> combiner)
    Equivalent of Stream.collect(Supplier, BiConsumer, BiConsumer).
    <R> ExStream<R>
    ExStream.exMapMulti(ExBiConsumer<? super T, ? super Consumer<R>, ?> mapper)
    Equivalent of Stream.mapMulti(BiConsumer).
    ExDoubleStream
    ExStream.exMapMultiToDouble(ExBiConsumer<? super T, ? super DoubleConsumer, ?> mapper)
    Equivalent of Stream.mapMultiToDouble(BiConsumer).
    ExIntStream
    ExStream.exMapMultiToInt(ExBiConsumer<? super T, ? super IntConsumer, ?> mapper)
    Equivalent of Stream.mapMultiToInt(BiConsumer).
    ExLongStream
    ExStream.exMapMultiToLong(ExBiConsumer<? super T, ? super LongConsumer, ?> mapper)
    Equivalent of Stream.mapMultiToLong(BiConsumer).
